modules.name: weilansec_simple_fetch.manage
documentation: 从clients包中引用对应的实现类

classes.name: weilansec_simple_fetch.manage.FetchType
documentation:
所有对接的API定义，比如接入了auth、device、vul, 那么就需要定义下面三个API
AUTH = "auth"
DEVICE = "device"
VUL = "vul"

methods.name: caasm_adapter_sdk.run.persistence.handler.tiny_db.TinyDBHandler.get_nested
documentation:
根据提供的路径 keys，动态访问嵌套字典的值。
\:param data: 要查询的嵌套字典
\:param keys: 字符串路径列表，如 \['contact', 'address', 'city'\]
\:return: 嵌套字段的值，如果路径不存在则返回 None
